prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DOUBLE-SPORTS-BELT Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Universal Fitting Unisex Sports Belt Double Expanding Pockets Cycling, Size M/L Description: Universal Fit for Waist Size 27-43 inches.

Use the expandable 8 inch pocket to carry your phone, keys, lip balm, sunscreen, flashlight, and anything else you may need in the outdoors. Black color goes with any outfit and reflective strips keep you seen at night. Don't get weighed down by a backpack next hiking trip, bring this instead.

Perfect for hiking, running, boating, cycling, marathons, or anything in between. Versatile and adjustable sports belt allows for a full range of movement while carrying all of your essentials anywhere. Features two 8 inch expanding pockets. Belt length fits most: 27-43 inches. Search Terms: sports belt running sports belt mens sports belt sports belt for women mens sports sweat belt women sports waist belt outdoor sports belt sports belt men wide belt sports gym sports waist belt double pocket belt double pocket Features: - 27-43 inch belt length - 1.5 inch buckle and reinforced zipper - 9 inch expanding pocket - Double 8 inch expanding pockets - Black with reflective strips === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Sports Belt M/L Black Double Pocket

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor M/L Black Sports Belt

anthropic.title_differentiation: Double Expanding Pockets, Fits 27-43 Inch Waist, Reflective Strips, Running And Hiking

openai.title_differentiation: Universal Fit 27-43 Inch Waist, Double 8 Inch Expanding Pockets, Reflective Strips, Reinforced Zipper
